nasb.text: You shall put the mercy seat on top of the ark, and in the ark you shall put the testimony which I will give to you.

esv.text: And you shall put the mercy seat on the top of the ark, and in the ark you shall put the testimony that I shall give you.

cnv.text: 你要把施恩座安放在櫃頂，又要把我賜給你的法版放在櫃裡。

ccb.text: 要把施恩座放在柜上面，把我赐给你的约版放在柜里。
